description: Case-sensitivity scope-guard canary: lowercase `templates/` directory (canonical location for email-templates, handlebars-templates, and similar legit-source content) MUST continue to be scanned. Round-4 audit recommended excluding lowercase `templates/` from the glob precisely because it is legit-source in many projects. jwt-detector must still fire on `templates/email.ts` both pre- and post-v0.15.4. If this canary flips silent, the `Templates*` glob is wrongly case-insensitive or has been duplicated as lowercase.
